risk_domain.name: Post-Mixer Linkability
risk_domain.description: Behavioral heuristics that link deposits to withdrawals across mixing protocols (Tornado Cash, Railgun, Privacy Pools) despite correct cryptographic privacy. Generalizes stealth_address_ops H3 (timing) and H6 (amounts) to the broader mixing context, adding multi-denomination, cross-protocol, and mixer-specific metadata leaks.

capabilities: full on-chain observation of all deposits and withdrawals across all mixing protocols
timing analysis across mempool and block timestamps with second-level precision
amount distribution modeling across fixed and variable denomination pools
cross-protocol behavioral correlation (mixer withdrawal -> DeFi interaction)
relay and gas pattern analysis for mixer-specific transaction fingerprinting
limitations: no ZK proof internals (cannot break cryptographic privacy directly)
no off-chain metadata (IP, browser) unless combined with RPC provider profile

H1_timing_correlation.name: timing correlation
H1_timing_correlation.description: Spending from a private address shortly after receiving narrows the anonymity set

signals.name: short_deposit_withdrawal
signals.description: The time interval between receiving funds and initiating a withdrawal is unusually short.

signals.name: frequent_small_withdrawals
signals.description: Multiple withdrawals occur within a short period, indicating potential mixing activity with reduced anonymity set due to frequent transactions.

signals.name: consistent_timing_window
signals.description: The user consistently withdraws within a narrow time window across multiple mixing operations, possibly indicating the same wallet being used.

signals.name: insufficient_dwell_time
signals.description: The dwell time between deposit and withdrawal is significantly shorter than expected for a normal transaction, suggesting an attempt to reduce anonymity.

recommendations.description: Delay deposits and withdrawals to randomize timing.
Randomize withdrawal times by a few minutes or hours within a day.
Utilize a mixing service to obfuscate transaction patterns.
Automatically delay transactions using scripting tools.

H2_amount_fingerprinting.name: amount fingerprinting
H2_amount_fingerprinting.description: Depositing or withdrawing specific amounts that can be uniquely identified among transactions

signals.name: low_match_count
signals.description: Identifies deposits with fewer than 3 matches within a 24-hour window in variable-amount pools.

signals.name: high_decimal_count
signals.description: Detects deposits with more than 4 decimal places, indicating a unique amount in active pools.

signals.name: unique_combination
signals.description: Looks for total value deposited from multiple fixed-denomination deposits that form a unique combination.

signals.name: prefer_fixed_denominations
signals.description: Identifies users who prefer using fixed-denomination pools over variable-amount shielded pools for high-privacy transactions.

recommendations.description: Always use variable-amount pools for transactions.
Avoid using fixed-denomination pools.
Round transaction amounts to a standard decimal place before sending.
Implement custom scripts to automatically round transactions and use variable pools.

H3_multi_denomination_linkage.name: multi-denomination linkage
H3_multi_denomination_linkage.description: Correlation in timing and value between deposits and withdrawals from multiple pools, reducing anonymity

signals.name: multi_denom_deposit_cluster
signals.description: Identify clusters of addresses making deposits in multiple denomination pools within a short time window.

signals.name: multi_denom_withdraw_cluster
signals.description: Detect withdrawals from multiple pools to the same or similar address clusters, correlating with deposit timings.

signals.name: value_fingerprint_match
signals.description: Check if the sum of deposited denominations matches the withdrawn amounts within a reasonable time frame.

signals.name: temporal_correlation_break
signals.description: Look for attempts to spread deposits across time and different addresses to avoid temporal correlation.

recommendations.description: Mix funds across multiple addresses to obscure their origin.
Delays transactions over extended periods.
Regularly change the addresses used for transactions.
Use a mixing service that supports multiple denominations.
Swap tokens for equivalent amounts in different pools.

H4_cross_protocol_linkage.name: cross-protocol linkage
H4_cross_protocol_linkage.description: Interactions with DeFi protocols or other chains that link the mixed funds to a user's identity

signals.name: withdrawal_to_defi
signals.description: Withdrawal address interacts with a DeFi protocol within 2 blocks of receiving mixer funds.

signals.name: defi_behavior_cluster
signals.description: Post-withdrawal DeFi interaction pattern matches a known address cluster's historical behavior (same protocols, similar amounts, same time-of-day).

signals.name: cross_chain_bridging
signals.description: Funds bridged to another chain within 1 hour of mixer withdrawal, creating cross-chain correlation opportunity.

signals.name: delayed_defi_engagement
signals.description: User followed recommendation -- Wait at least 24 hours and multiple intervening transactions before using mixed funds in identifiable DeFi protocols.

recommendations.description: Wait at least 24 hours before using funds in identifiable DeFi protocols.
Always use your own private keys and avoid hot wallets for sensitive operations.
Manually approve any cross-chain transfers to prevent automated bridging.
Monitor the withdrawal address for unexpected activity using a blockchain explorer tool.

H5_mixer_specific_metadata_leaks.name: mixer-specific metadata leaks
H5_mixer_specific_metadata_leaks.description: Using specific services or patterns that can be traced back to a single user or address

signals.name: specific_relayer_usage
signals.description: Withdrawal uses a specific relayer that handles <5% of pool withdrawals, narrowing anonymity set.

signals.name: repeated_withdrawal_addresses
signals.description: Same address used as withdrawal destination for multiple separate mixing operations, indicating a single user.

signals.name: distinctive_gas_price
signals.description: Withdrawal transaction gas price or priority fee is distinctive (>2 std devs from block median or matches a known wallet configuration.

signals.name: address_reuse_prevention
signals.description: User followed recommendation -- Generate a new address for every mixer withdrawal. Never reuse withdrawal addresses across mixing operations.

recommendations.description: Use different relayers for each mixing operation to increase anonymity.
Set gas price randomly to avoid distinctive patterns.
Create a unique withdrawal address for each mixing session.
Automate the selection of random relayers using a script.

combined_benchmark.description: End-to-end benchmark measuring post-mixer linkability with all behavioral heuristics applied

methodology.step_1: Generate synthetic deposit/withdrawal dataset with realistic timing, amount, and behavioral distributions across multiple mixer protocols
methodology.step_2: Run adversary simulator applying all 5 heuristics (timing, amount, multi-denomination, cross-protocol, metadata)
methodology.step_3: Measure baseline linking rate per heuristic and combined
methodology.step_4: Apply profile recommendations to all operations
methodology.step_5: Re-run adversary simulator on modified operations
methodology.step_6: Compare: linking rate before vs after, broken down by pool activity level

combined_benchmark.target: Reduce combined linking rate from ~30-50% (estimated baseline) to <5% with all recommendations applied

adversary_levels.name: advanced
adversary_levels.description: All heuristics including cross-protocol behavioral correlation

templates.risk_assessment: Mixer operation triggers {heuristic_id} ({heuristic_name}): {signal_description}. Confidence: {confidence}. Anonymity set: ~{anon_set}. Recommendation: {recommendation}.
templates.summary: Analyzed {n_txs} mixer operations. {n_risky} linkability risks detected ({pct_risky}%). Average anonymity set: ~{avg_anon_set}. Top risks: {top_risks}.
templates.summary_clean: All {n_txs} mixer operations pass linkability checks. Anonymity sets adequate.
templates.skill_suggestion: To mitigate {heuristic_name}, I can {skill_action}. This improves anonymity set by ~{effectiveness_pct}%. {user_cost_note}
templates.pool_recommendation: Pool {pool_name}: {n_deposits} deposits in last {window}h. Optimal withdrawal time: {peak_hour}:00 UTC ({peak_count} withdrawals/hr). Anonymity set: ~{anon_set}.
templates.cross_protocol_warning: WARNING: Immediate DeFi interaction after mixer withdrawal. {defi_protocol} interaction within {minutes} minutes links this withdrawal to behavioral profile. Recommendation: wait {recommended_delay}h.
